text: A district may purchase an additional insured provision to any liability insurance contract.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 173. Intermunicipal Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 173.255 — Purchase of Additional Insured Provisions

A district may purchase an additional insured provision to any liability insurance contract.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: A district may purchase an additional insured provision to any liability insurance contract.
